001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.assertions;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.contains;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.io.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028import java.util.regex.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033
034/**
035 * Used for fluent assertion calls against strings.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
038 * <p class='bjava'>
039 *    <jc>// Validates the response body of an HTTP call is the text "OK".</jc>
040 *    <jv>client</jv>
041 *       .get(<jsf>URL</jsf>)
042 *       .run()
043 *       .assertContent().is(<js>"OK"</js>);
044 * </p>
045 *
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Test Methods:</h5>
048 * <p>
049 * <ul class='javatree'>
050 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FluentStringAssertion}
051 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
052 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#is(String) is(String)}
053 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isNot(String) isNot(String)}
054 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isLines(String...) isLines(String...)}
055 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isSortedLines(String...) isSortedLines(String...)}
056 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isIc(String) isIc(String)}
057 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isNotIc(String) isNotIc(String)}
058 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isContains(String...) isContains(String...)}
059 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isNotContains(String...) isNotContains(String...)}
060 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isEmpty() isEmpty()}
061 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isNotEmpty() isNotEmpty()}
062 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isString(Object) isString(Object)}
063 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isMatches(String) isMatches(String)}
064 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isPattern(String) isPattern(String)}
065 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isPattern(String,int) isPattern(String,int)}
066 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isPattern(Pattern) isPattern(Pattern)}
067 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isStartsWith(String) isStartsWith(String)}
068 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#isEndsWith(String) isEndsWith(String)}
069 *    </ul>
070 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion}
071 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
072 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isExists() isExists()}
073 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#is(Object) is(Object)}
074 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#is(Predicate) is(Predicate)}
075 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isNot(Object) isNot(Object)}
076 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isAny(Object...) isAny(Object...)}
077 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isNotAny(Object...) isNotAny(Object...)}
078 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isNull() isNull()}
079 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isNotNull() isNotNull()}
080 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isString(String) isString(String)}
081 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isJson(String) isJson(String)}
082 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isSame(Object) isSame(Object)}
083 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isSameJsonAs(Object) isSameJsonAs(Object)}
084 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isSameSortedJsonAs(Object) isSameSortedJsonAs(Object)}
085 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isSameSerializedAs(Object, WriterSerializer) isSameSerializedAs(Object, WriterSerializer)}
086 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isType(Class) isType(Class)}
087 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#isExactType(Class) isExactType(Class)}
088 *    </ul>
089 * </ul>
090 *
091 * <h5 class='section'>Transform Methods:</h5>
092 * <p>
093 * <ul class='javatree'>
094 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FluentStringAssertion}
095 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
096 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asReplaceAll(String,String) asReplaceAll(String,String)}
097 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asReplace(String,String) asReplace(String,String)}
098 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asUrlDecode() asUrlDecode()}
099 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asLc() asLc()}
100 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asUc() asUc()}
101 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asLines() asLines()}
102 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asSplit(String) asSplit(String)}
103 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asLength() asLength()}
104 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentStringAssertion#asOneLine() asOneLine()}
105  *   </ul>
106 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion}
107 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
108 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asString() asString()}
109 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asString(WriterSerializer) asString(WriterSerializer)}
110 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asString(Function) asString(Function)}
111 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asJson() asJson()}
112 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asJsonSorted() asJsonSorted()}
113 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asTransformed(UnaryOperator) asTransformed(UnaryOperator)}
114 *       <li class='jm'>{@link FluentObjectAssertion#asAny() asAny()}
115 * </ul>
116 * </ul>
117 *
118 * <h5 class='section'>Configuration Methods:</h5>
119 * <p>
120 * <ul class='javatree'>
121 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Assertion}
122 *    <ul class='javatreec'>
123 *       <li class='jm'>{@link Assertion#setMsg(String, Object...) setMsg(String, Object...)}
124 *       <li class='jm'>{@link Assertion#setOut(PrintStream) setOut(PrintStream)}
125 *       <li class='jm'>{@link Assertion#setSilent() setSilent()}
126 *       <li class='jm'>{@link Assertion#setStdOut() setStdOut()}
127 *       <li class='jm'>{@link Assertion#setThrowable(Class) setThrowable(Class)}
128 *    </ul>
129 * </ul>
130 *
131 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
132 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauEcosystemOverview">Juneau Ecosystem Overview</a>
133 * </ul>
134 *
135 * @param <R> The return type.
136 */
137@SuppressWarnings({
138   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
139})
140public class FluentStringAssertion<R> extends FluentObjectAssertion<String,R> {
141
142   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
143   private static final String ARG_lines = "lines";
144   private static final String ARG_pattern = "pattern";
145   private static final String ARG_regex = "regex";
146   private static final String ARG_replacement = "replacement";
147   private static final String ARG_searchPattern = "searchPattern";
148   private static final String LINE_SEPARATOR_REGEX = "[\\r\\n]+";
149   private static final String ARG_string = "string";
150   private static final String ARG_target = "target";
151   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
152
153   private static final Messages MESSAGES = Messages.of(FluentStringAssertion.class, "Messages");
154   private static final String MSG_stringDifferedAtPosition = MESSAGES.getString("stringDifferedAtPosition");
155   private static final String MSG_expectedStringHadDifferentNumbersOfLines = MESSAGES.getString("expectedStringHadDifferentNumbersOfLines");
156   private static final String MSG_expectedStringHadDifferentValuesAtLine = MESSAGES.getString("expectedStringHadDifferentValuesAtLine");
157   private static final String MSG_stringEqualedUnexpected = MESSAGES.getString("stringEqualedUnexpected");
158   private static final String MSG_stringDidNotContainExpectedSubstring = MESSAGES.getString("stringDidNotContainExpectedSubstring");
159   private static final String MSG_stringContainedUnexpectedSubstring = MESSAGES.getString("stringContainedUnexpectedSubstring");
160   private static final String MSG_stringWasNotEmpty = MESSAGES.getString("stringWasNotEmpty");
161   private static final String MSG_stringWasNull = MESSAGES.getString("stringWasNull");
162   private static final String MSG_stringWasEmpty = MESSAGES.getString("stringWasEmpty");
163   private static final String MSG_stringDidNotMatchExpectedPattern = MESSAGES.getString("stringDidNotMatchExpectedPattern");
164   private static final String MSG_stringDidNotStartWithExpected = MESSAGES.getString("stringDidNotStartWithExpected");
165   private static final String MSG_stringDidNotEndWithExpected = MESSAGES.getString("stringDidNotEndWithExpected");
166
167   private boolean javaStrings;
168
169   /**
170    * Chained constructor.
171    *
172    * <p>
173    * Used when transforming one assertion into another so that the assertion config can be used by the new assertion.
174    *
175    * @param creator
176    *    The assertion that created this assertion.
177    *    <br>Should be <jk>null</jk> if this is the top-level assertion.
178    * @param value
179    *    The object being tested.
180    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
181    * @param returns
182    *    The object to return after a test method is called.
183    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, the test method returns this object allowing multiple test method calls to be
184    * used on the same assertion.
185    */
186   public FluentStringAssertion(Assertion creator, String value, R returns) {
187      super(creator, value, returns);
188   }
189
190   /**
191    * Constructor.
192    *
193    * @param value
194    *    The object being tested.
195    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
196    * @param returns
197    *    The object to return after a test method is called.
198    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, the test method returns this object allowing multiple test method calls to be
199    * used on the same assertion.
200    */
201   public FluentStringAssertion(String value, R returns) {
202      this(null, value, returns);
203   }
204
205   /**
206    * When enabled, text in the message is converted to valid Java strings.
207    *
208    * <p class='bjava'>
209    *    <jv>value</jv>.replaceAll(<js>"\\\\"</js>, <js>"\\\\\\\\"</js>).replaceAll(<js>"\n"</js>, <js>"\\\\n"</js>).replaceAll(<js>"\t"</js>, <js>"\\\\t"</js>);
210    * </p>
211    *
212    * @return This object.
213    */
214   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asJavaStrings() {
215      this.javaStrings = true;
216      return this;
217   }
218
219   /**
220    * Converts the text to lowercase.
221    *
222    * @return This object.
223    */
224   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asLc() {
225      return asTransformed(x -> x == null ? null : x.toLowerCase());
226   }
227
228   /**
229    * Returns the length of this string as an integer assertion.
230    *
231    * @return This object.
232    */
233   public FluentIntegerAssertion<R> asLength() {
234      return new FluentIntegerAssertion<>(this, valueIsNull() ? null : value().length(), returns());
235   }
236
237   /**
238    * Splits the string into lines.
239    *
240    * @return This object.
241    */
242   public FluentListAssertion<String,R> asLines() {
243      return asSplit(LINE_SEPARATOR_REGEX);
244   }
245
246   /**
247    * Removes any newlines from the string.
248    *
249    * @return This object.
250    */
251   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asOneLine() {
252      return asTransformed(x -> x == null ? null : x.replaceAll("[\\r\\n]+[ \\t]*", "  "));
253   }
254
255   /**
256    * Performs the specified substring replacement on the underlying string.
257    *
258    * @param target The sequence of char values to be replaced.
259    * @param replacement The replacement sequence of char values.
260    * @return This object.
261    */
262   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asReplace(String target, String replacement) {
263      assertArgNotNull(ARG_target, target);
264      assertArgNotNull(ARG_replacement, replacement);
265      return asTransformed(x -> x == null ? null : x.replace(target, replacement));
266   }
267
268   /**
269    * Performs the specified regular expression replacement on the underlying string.
270    *
271    * @param regex The regular expression to which this string is to be matched.
272    * @param replacement The string to be substituted for each match.
273    * @return This object.
274    */
275   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asReplaceAll(String regex, String replacement) {
276      assertArgNotNull(ARG_regex, regex);
277      assertArgNotNull(ARG_replacement, replacement);
278      return asTransformed(x -> x == null ? null : x.replaceAll(regex, replacement));
279   }
280
281   /**
282    * Splits the string into lines using the specified regular expression.
283    *
284    * @param regex The delimiting regular expression
285    * @return This object.
286    */
287   public FluentListAssertion<String,R> asSplit(String regex) {
288      assertArgNotNull(ARG_regex, regex);
289      return new FluentListAssertion<>(this, valueIsNull() ? null : l(value().trim().split(regex)), returns());
290   }
291
292   @Override /* Overridden from FluentObjectAssertion */
293   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asTransformed(UnaryOperator<String> function) {
294      return new FluentStringAssertion<>(this, function.apply(orElse(null)), returns());
295   }
296
297   /**
298    * Removes any leading/trailing whitespace from the string.
299    *
300    * @return This object.
301    */
302   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asTrimmed() {
303      return new FluentStringAssertion<>(this, valueIsNull() ? null : value().trim(), returns());
304   }
305
306   /**
307    * Converts the text to uppercase.
308    *
309    * @return This object.
310    */
311   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asUc() {
312      return asTransformed(x -> x == null ? null : x.toUpperCase());
313   }
314
315   /**
316    * URL-decodes the text in this assertion.
317    *
318    * @return This object.
319    */
320   public FluentStringAssertion<R> asUrlDecode() {
321      return asTransformed(StringUtils::urlDecode);
322   }
323
324   /**
325    * Asserts that the text equals the specified value.
326    *
327    * <p>
328    * Similar to {@link #is(String)} except error message states diff position.
329    *
330    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
331    * <p class='bjava'>
332    *    <jc>// Validates the response body of an HTTP call is the text "OK".</jc>
333    *    <jv>client</jv>
334    *       .get(<jsf>URL</jsf>)
335    *       .run()
336    *       .assertContent().is(<js>"OK"</js>);
337    * </p>
338    *
339    * @param value
340    *    The value to check against.
341    *    <br>If multiple values are specified, they are concatenated with newlines.
342    * @return The fluent return object.
343    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
344    */
345   @Override
346   public R is(String value) throws AssertionError {
347      var s = orElse(null);
348      if (neq(value, s))
349         throw error(MSG_stringDifferedAtPosition, diffPosition(value, s), fix(value), fix(s));
350      return returns();
351   }
352
353   /**
354    * Asserts that the text contains all of the specified substrings.
355    *
356    * @param values The values to check against.
357    * @return The fluent return object.
358    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
359    */
360   public R isContains(String...values) throws AssertionError {
361      assertArgNotNull(ARG_values, values);
362      var s = orElse(null);
363      for (var substring : values)
364         if (nn(substring) && ! contains(s, substring))
365            throw error(MSG_stringDidNotContainExpectedSubstring, fix(substring), fix(s));
366      return returns();
367   }
368
369   /**
370    * Asserts that the text is empty.
371    *
372    * @return The fluent return object.
373    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
374    */
375   public R isEmpty() throws AssertionError {
376      var s = orElse(null);
377      if (nn(s) && ! s.isEmpty())
378         throw error(MSG_stringWasNotEmpty, fix(s));
379      return returns();
380   }
381
382   /**
383    * Asserts that the text ends with the specified string.
384    *
385    * @param string The string to test for.
386    * @return The fluent return object.
387    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
388    */
389   public R isEndsWith(String string) {
390      assertArgNotNull(ARG_string, string);
391      var s = value();
392      if (! s.endsWith(string))
393         throw error(MSG_stringDidNotEndWithExpected, fix(string), fix(s));
394      return returns();
395   }
396
397   /**
398    * Asserts that the text equals the specified value ignoring case.
399    *
400    * @param value The value to check against.
401    * @return The fluent return object.
402    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
403    */
404   public R isIc(String value) throws AssertionError {
405      var s = orElse(null);
406      if (neqic(value, s))
407         throw error(MSG_stringDifferedAtPosition, diffPositionIc(value, s), fix(value), fix(s));
408      return returns();
409   }
410
411   /**
412    * Asserts that the lines of text equals the specified value.
413    *
414    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
415    * <p class='bjava'>
416    *    <jc>// Validates the response body of an HTTP call is the text "OK".</jc>
417    *    <jv>client</jv>
418    *       .get(<jsf>URL</jsf>)
419    *       .run()
420    *       .assertContent().isLines(
421    *          <js>"Line 1"</js>,
422    *          <js>"Line 2"</js>,
423    *          <js>"Line 3"</js>
424    *       );
425    * </p>
426    *
427    * @param lines
428    *    The value to check against.
429    *    <br>If multiple values are specified, they are concatenated with newlines.
430    * @return The fluent return object.
431    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
432    */
433   public R isLines(String...lines) throws AssertionError {
434      assertArgNotNull(ARG_lines, lines);
435      var v = join(lines, '\n');
436      var s = value();
437      if (neq(v, s))
438         throw error(MSG_stringDifferedAtPosition, diffPosition(v, s), fix(v), fix(s));
439      return returns();
440   }
441
442   /**
443    * Asserts that the text matches the specified pattern containing <js>"*"</js> meta characters.
444    *
445    * <p>
446    * The <js>"*"</js> meta character can be used to represent zero or more characters..
447    *
448    * @param searchPattern The search pattern.
449    * @return The fluent return object.
450    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
451    */
452   public R isMatches(String searchPattern) throws AssertionError {
453      assertArgNotNull(ARG_searchPattern, searchPattern);
454      return isPattern(getMatchPattern(searchPattern));
455   }
456
457   /**
458    * Asserts that the text equals the specified value.
459    *
460    * @param value The value to check against.
461    * @return The fluent return object.
462    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
463    */
464   @Override
465   public R isNot(String value) throws AssertionError {
466      var s = orElse(null);
467      if (eq(value, s))
468         throw error(MSG_stringEqualedUnexpected, fix(s));
469      return returns();
470   }
471
472   /**
473    * Asserts that the text doesn't contain any of the specified substrings.
474    *
475    * @param values The values to check against.
476    * @return The fluent return object.
477    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
478    */
479   public R isNotContains(String...values) throws AssertionError {
480      assertArgNotNull(ARG_values, values);
481      var s = orElse(null);
482      for (var substring : values)
483         if (nn(substring) && contains(s, substring))
484            throw error(MSG_stringContainedUnexpectedSubstring, fix(substring), fix(s));
485      return returns();
486   }
487
488   /**
489    * Asserts that the text is not null or empty.
490    *
491    * @return The fluent return object.
492    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
493    */
494   public R isNotEmpty() throws AssertionError {
495      var s = orElse(null);
496      if (s == null)
497         throw error(MSG_stringWasNull);
498      if (s.isEmpty())
499         throw error(MSG_stringWasEmpty);
500      return returns();
501   }
502
503   /**
504    * Asserts that the text does not equal the specified value ignoring case.
505    *
506    * @param value The value to check against.
507    * @return The fluent return object.
508    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
509    */
510   public R isNotIc(String value) throws AssertionError {
511      var s = orElse(null);
512      if (eqic(value, s))
513         throw error(MSG_stringEqualedUnexpected, fix(s));
514      return returns();
515   }
516
517   /**
518    * Asserts that the text matches the specified regular expression pattern.
519    *
520    * @param pattern The pattern to test for.
521    * @return The fluent return object.
522    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
523    */
524   public R isPattern(Pattern pattern) throws AssertionError {
525      assertArgNotNull(ARG_pattern, pattern);
526      var s = value();
527      if (! pattern.matcher(s).matches())
528         throw error(MSG_stringDidNotMatchExpectedPattern, fix(pattern.pattern()), fix(s));
529      return returns();
530   }
531
532   /**
533    * Asserts that the text matches the specified regular expression.
534    *
535    * @param regex The pattern to test for.
536    * @return The fluent return object.
537    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
538    */
539   public R isPattern(String regex) throws AssertionError {
540      return isPattern(regex, 0);
541   }
542
543   /**
544    * Asserts that the text matches the specified regular expression.
545    *
546    * @param regex The pattern to test for.
547    * @param flags Pattern match flags.  See {@link Pattern#compile(String, int)}.
548    * @return The fluent return object.
549    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
550    */
551   public R isPattern(String regex, int flags) throws AssertionError {
552      assertArgNotNull(ARG_regex, regex);
553      var p = Pattern.compile(regex, flags);
554      var s = value();
555      if (! p.matcher(s).matches())
556         throw error(MSG_stringDidNotMatchExpectedPattern, fix(regex), fix(s));
557      return returns();
558   }
559
560   /**
561    * Asserts that the text equals the specified value after splitting both by newlines and sorting the rows.
562    *
563    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
564    * <p class='bjava'>
565    *    <jc>// Validates the response body of an HTTP call is the text "OK".</jc>
566    *    <jv>client</jv>
567    *       .get(<jsf>URL</jsf>)
568    *       .run()
569    *       .assertContent().isSortedLines(
570    *          <js>"Line 1"</js>,
571    *          <js>"Line 2"</js>,
572    *          <js>"Line 3"</js>
573    *       );
574    * </p>
575    *
576    * @param lines
577    *    The value to check against.
578    *    <br>If multiple values are specified, they are concatenated with newlines.
579    * @return The fluent return object.
580    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
581    */
582   public R isSortedLines(String...lines) {
583      assertArgNotNull(ARG_lines, lines);
584
585      // Must work for windows too.
586      var e = join(lines, '\n').trim().split(LINE_SEPARATOR_REGEX);
587      var a = value().trim().split(LINE_SEPARATOR_REGEX);
588
589      if (e.length != a.length)
590         throw error(MSG_expectedStringHadDifferentNumbersOfLines, e.length, a.length);
591
592      Arrays.sort(e);
593      Arrays.sort(a);
594
595      for (var i = 0; i < e.length; i++)
596         if (! e[i].equals(a[i]))
597            throw error(MSG_expectedStringHadDifferentValuesAtLine, i + 1, e[i], a[i]);
598
599      return returns();
600   }
601
602   /**
603    * Asserts that the text starts with the specified string.
604    *
605    * @param string The string to test for.
606    * @return The fluent return object.
607    * @throws AssertionError If assertion failed.
608    */
609   public R isStartsWith(String string) {
610      assertArgNotNull(ARG_string, string);
611      var s = value();
612      if (! s.startsWith(string))
613         throw error(MSG_stringDidNotStartWithExpected, fix(string), fix(s));
614      return returns();
615   }
616
617   /**
618    * Asserts that the text equals the specified object after calling {@link #toString()} on the object.
619    *
620    * @param value The value to check against.
621    * @return The fluent return object.
622    */
623   public R isString(Object value) {
624      return is(value == null ? null : toString());
625   }
626
627   @Override /* Overridden from Assertion */
628   public FluentStringAssertion<R> setMsg(String msg, Object...args) {
629      super.setMsg(msg, args);
630      return this;
631   }
632
633   @Override /* Overridden from Assertion */
634   public FluentStringAssertion<R> setOut(PrintStream value) {
635      super.setOut(value);
636      return this;
637   }
638
639   @Override /* Overridden from Assertion */
640   public FluentStringAssertion<R> setSilent() {
641      super.setSilent();
642      return this;
643   }
644
645   @Override /* Overridden from Assertion */
646   public FluentStringAssertion<R> setStdOut() {
647      super.setStdOut();
648      return this;
649   }
650
651   @Override /* Overridden from Assertion */
652   public FluentStringAssertion<R> setThrowable(Class<? extends java.lang.RuntimeException> value) {
653      super.setThrowable(value);
654      return this;
655   }
656
657   private String fix(String text) {
658      if (javaStrings)
659         text = text.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("\n", "\\n").replace("\t", "\\t");
660      return text;
661   }
662}
